holdings.infoBox: TRUF is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street Financial Select Sector SPDR ETF stock at 59.87%, Berkshire Hathaway at 4.72%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.62%, Visa Inc. at 2.88%, and Mastercard at 2.12%.

overview.description: The VanEck Financials TruSector ETF (TRUF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through exposure to US companies in the financials sector. Stock selection uses a discretionary investment process TRUF was launched on Apr 1, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.
